query:
SELECT 'species' as tbl, id, name, NULL as extra FROM species
UNION ALL
SELECT 'category', id, name, idPrefix FROM animal_categories
UNION ALL
SELECT 'status', id, name, CAST(isExitStatus AS CHAR) FROM animal_statuses
UNION ALL
SELECT 'group', id, CONCAT(groupCode, ' - ', name), NULL FROM `groups`
UNION ALL
SELECT 'birthtype', id, name, NULL FROM birth_types
UNION ALL
SELECT 'feeditem', id, name, NULL FROM feed_items
UNION ALL
SELECT 'expcategory', id, name, NULL FROM expense_categories
ORDER BY tbl, id;
